essence: Work that blends music, film, and theater — identity, trauma, and human resilience.
bioLead: Steve Brock is a Los Angeles–based actor, singer-songwriter, filmmaker, and screenwriter — a soulful storyteller whose work moves between the stage, the screen, and the recording booth. The through-line is the same in every medium:
recognition: 66 festival wins · 24 nominations — for acting, writing & producing

screen.title: Even Steve
screen.blurb: An alt-history of his own life — what might have been — as a young musician tries to make it in LA's singer-songwriter scene.

screen.title: Making Amends
screen.blurb: A young woman confronts her father's addiction — and a choice that will define her. A film about love, responsibility, and resilience.

screen.title: Echoes of Kerberos
screen.blurb: A thriller about a man in crisis. Steve wrote it, produced it, and played the lead — and it earned honors on the festival circuit.

stage.title: My Calico Soul
stage.blurb: A one-man show — “a journey of bisexual identity and the labels we embrace” — written and performed by Steve, directed by Jessica Lynn Johnson. A sold-out run at the Hollywood Fringe Festival.

stage.title: My Fair Lady
stage.blurb: Musical theater and stage work — from My Fair Lady onward — where the acting and the singing meet.
